title: Department Manager Vacancy at Hypercity - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Hypercity - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Hypercity is actively seeking a talented and motivated Department Manager to join our dynamic team in Kanpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Hypercity:
Hypercity is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hypercity!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
